desc.home: The future of decentralized communication. Secure, resilient, and unstoppable messaging over Reticulum.
desc.download: Download MeshChatX for Windows, Linux, macOS, Docker, or Python. Decentralized messaging over Reticulum.
desc.contact: Contact the MeshChatX dev via LXMF (Reticulum messaging).
desc.donate: Support MeshChatX development. We only accept Monero at this time.

footer.tagline: Secure, resilient, and unstoppable communication over the Reticulum network.
footer.meta_site: MeshChatX is a quad4.io project.

donate.lead: MeshChatX is built for the community. Your donation helps fund development and infrastructure costs.
donate.xmr_only: We only accept Monero (XMR) at this time.

hero.lead_before: MeshChatX is a highly custom fork of the original
hero.lead_after: . We have added many features and improvements.

section.infra_lead: Built for mesh networks and censorship resistance.

feature.decentralized_p: Built on Reticulum. No central servers, no single point of failure. Total ownership of your data.
feature.crypto_p: Reticulum uses efficient, strong, and well-tested cryptographic primitives designed for safety and reliability across all platforms.
feature.mesh_p: Communicate across any medium. MeshChatX works over the internet, radio, LoRa, and many other mediums!
feature.platform_p: Officially supported on Desktop (Electron) and Web (Docker/Python). Android is available via Termux.

split.item1_p: Generate multiple identities instantly. No phone number, email, or government ID needed. Ever.
split.item2_p: Synchronize messages through the network automatically. Your messages wait for you, even when you're offline.
